zh.lifeSummary: 當Christian Plessis於大約1257年出生在英國史洛普爾時，她的父親Hugh du Plessis Baron of Arundel21歲，母親Isabel Biset22歲。她於大約1270年與John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1331年5月8日之後在英國萊希斯特斯爾，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾查阿可姆查阿可姆 普利奧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christian Plessis于大约1257年出生在英国史洛普爾时，她的父亲Hugh du Plessis Baron of Arundel21岁，母亲Isabel Biset22岁。她于大约1270年与John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1331年5月8日之后在英国萊希斯特斯爾，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾查阿可姆查阿可姆 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Christian Plessis was born about 1257, in Shropshire, England, her father, Hugh du Plessis Baron of Arundel, was 21 and her mother, Isabel Biset, was 22. She married John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave about 1270, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. She died after 8 May 1331, in Leicestershire, England, and was buried in Chacombe Priory, Chacombe, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christian Plessis est née environ 1257, à Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh du Plessis Baron of Arundel, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Isabel Biset, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave environ 1270, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée après 8 mai 1331, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Chacombe Priory, Chacombe, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christian Plessis um 1257 in Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh du Plessis Baron of Arundel 21 und ihre Mutter Isabel Biset 22. Sie hat um 1270 in England John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb nach 8. Mai 1331 in Leicestershire, England und wurde in Chacombe Priory, Chacombe, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Plessis è nata il circa 1257 nel Shropshire, England, sua padre, Hugh du Plessis Baron of Arundel, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Isabel Biset, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave circa 1270, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì dopo il 8 maggio 1331, nel Leicestershire, England, e fu sepolta a Chacombe Priory, Chacombe, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Christian Plessisが約1257年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Hugh du Plessis Baron of Arundelは21歳，母Isabel Bisetは22歳であった。約1270年にイギリスでJohn Segrave 2nd Baron Segraveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1331年5月8日以後にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアチャコンベチャコンベ プリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Christian Plessis(이)가 대략 1257년 영국 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh du Plessis Baron of Arundel(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Biset(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1270년 영국에서 John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1331년 5월 8일 이후 영국 레이스스터실르에서 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 차코브 차코브 플리오리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Plessis nasceu aproximadamente 1257, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh du Plessis Baron of Arundel, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Biset, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave aproximadamente 1270, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu após 8 de maio de 1331, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Chacombe Priory, Chacombe, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christian Plessis родилась около 1257 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh du Plessis Baron of Arundel было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel Biset, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave около 1270 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла после 8 май 1331 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия и была похоронена в местности чакомб приори, чакомб, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christian Plessis nació aproximadamente 1257, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh du Plessis Baron of Arundel, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Isabel Biset, tenía 22 años. Se casó con John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave aproximadamente 1270, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió después de 8 de mayo de 1331, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Chacombe Priory, Chacombe, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
